title: Top-quality foxes (16 variants)
description: This texture pack adds 16 variants of foxes and other similar animals.
body:
This texture pack adds 16 variants of foxes and other similar animals. Requires Optifine or similar mods.
# Complete list of fox variants:
## Any snowy biome:
Arctic fox,
Wolverine

## Any temperate biome:
Red fox,
Platinum fox,
Cross fox,
Raccoon,
Opossum,
Skunk,
Badger

## Bamboo jungle:
Red panda

## Savanna, sparse jungle:
Bat-eared fox,
Honey badger,
## 
## Savanna plateau, windswept savanna, eroded badlands, wooded badlands:
Blanford's fox

## Desert, badlands:
Fennec fox,
Meerkat,
Corsac fox



Credits: basic red and snow fox texture: https://faithfulpack.net/
